script:
import time

def Execute(executor, node):
    url = executor.GetInputValue(node, 'URL')
    wait_time = executor.GetInputValue(node, 'WaitTime') or 2.0
    print(f'Web: Accessing {url}')
    
    try:
        executor.webDriver.get(url)
        time.sleep(wait_time)
        executor.SendData(node, 'Success', {'valueJson': 'True', 'typeName': 'System.Boolean'})
    except Exception as e:
        executor.LogError(f'Access Error: {e}')
        executor.SendData(node, 'Success', {'valueJson': 'False', 'typeName': 'System.Boolean'})

    executor.PutQueue(node)
